summary_en: Specific metrics and targets not disclosed in first two pages. Board resolution on 2026/5/14 to evaluate and improve capital-cost-conscious management framework; details in attached materials.
title_en: Response to Capital Cost and Share Price Consciousness Management (Update) – May 14, 2026
translation_en_brief: On May 14, 2026, Saylor Advertising Inc. (TSE Standard, code 2156) filed a COC update notification. The board held a meeting on that date to re-evaluate and analyse current progress toward realizing capital-cost-conscious and share-price-aware management. A resolution was adopted to decide on future improvement measures. The disclosure itself does not provide specific metric targets or performance data in the opening pages; full details are contained in the attached materials referenced in the filing.
